SheetStyleMode.Name: Sheet Style
SheetStyleMode.Hint: Choose the visual style for Synthicide sheets.

proveStrength.label: Prove your Strength
proveStrength.behavior: If you personally dominate a worthy adversary, gain 1 Resolve.

spreadWisdom.label: Spread your Wisdom
spreadWisdom.behavior: Whenever you convince someone to believe an important part of your world-view, gain 1 Resolve.

forgiveness.label: Forgiveness is Powerful
forgiveness.behavior: If you let fleeing enemies escape, or forgive a substantial debt, gain 1 Resolve.

getEven.label: Don’t Get Mad, Get Even
getEven.behavior: If you balance a debt owed to you, or deny mercy to an opponent, gain 1 Resolve.

makeFriends.label: Make Friends and Allies
makeFriends.behavior: If you gain the trust of new people, or make sacrifices to preserve that trust, gain 1 Resolve.

knowUniverse.label: Know the Universe
knowUniverse.behavior: If you discover significant information, or learn the answer to a mystery, gain 1 Resolve.

liveFast.label: Live Fast, Die Young
liveFast.behavior: If you take unnecessary risks for the thrill, or abandon a long-term goal for immediate gratification, gain 1 Resolve.

Bioclass.NoneAssigned: No bioclass assigned. Drop or create one.
Bioclass.OnlyOneWarning: Only one bioclass may be assigned to an actor.

Aspect.NoneAssigned: No aspect assigned. Drop or create one.

PresetDescriptions.skinbag: To be totally organic means you can never benefit from cybernetic upgrades, yet you may develop psychic powers. Players who select this bioclass must decide if their character is a mutant or among the few remaining genetically unaltered humans.
PresetDescriptions.scraphead: An extensive surgical operation empowered your brain with cybernetic plugs, amplifying your cognitive functiing. This bioclass may benefit from cybernetic brain upgrades, but never body upgrades. Scrapheads cannot develop psychic powers, but they may access mutations.
PresetDescriptions.hardshell: Body rigs are specialized for physical tasks. This bioclass may buy cybernetic body upgrades, but not brain upgrades. You have access to mutations and can learn psychic powers.
PresetDescriptions.rigfiend: Someone with both a rigged body and rigged mind is entirely dependent on cybernetics. This bioclass may gain any cybernetic upgrade. However, a Rigfiend may not access mutations or psychic powers.

TechlessWill.Name: Techless Will
TechlessWill.Description: Three times per day, add +3 to any attribute check (including Speed). In battle this lasts 1 round; in roleplay it applies to one check.

GeneticLegacy.Name: Genetic Legacy
GeneticLegacy.Description: Choose one: Mutant Dog or Dying Breed. Mutant Dog grants 4 mutation-only trait points and -2 Nerve. Dying Breed grants milestone attribute and trait bonuses as described by the bioclass.

HardBrain.Name: Hard Brain
HardBrain.Description: You may not purchase psychic powers with trait points.

StarterSoftware.Name: Starter Software
StarterSoftware.Description: Choose a knowledge focus and gain 2 of its powers, as listed in character traits and powers.

StarterHardware.Name: Starter Hardware
StarterHardware.Description: Choose one permanent increase: Cyber Eyes (+1 Awareness) or Servo Limbs (+1 Combat).

ModFocused.Name: Mod Focused
ModFocused.Description: You cannot gain psychic powers and cannot permanently mutate through traits. General traits cost 3 TP instead of 2.

PresetDescriptions.brainiac: Gifted with prodigal intellect, you take great pride in your research and talent.
PresetDescriptions.bulbhead: You are a psychic that struggles to function without Illuminix, an addictive and illegal substance traded underground.
PresetDescriptions.leader: You empower everyone around you; the universe just can't keep you down.
PresetDescriptions.scoundrel: You are a tricky individual who favors the element of surprise.
PresetDescriptions.thug: Death has visited you more times than you can count, yet your innate martial prowess has kept you alive.
